compatibility.non_breaking_rule: extra fields must be ignored by engine consumers

notes: PSOM is treated as governance reference; when PSOM.section is conceptual (e.g., hero/main), routing uses page default_section.
All routing keys are case- and symbol-sensitive. Do not mutate section keys without updating page snapshots and PSOM.
